destinies.name: Destruction
destinies.tagline: Your fate is to end something that should not endure.
destinies.coreQuestion: Did something permanent end because of you?

hopeRecovery.title: The Purge
hopeRecovery.description: When you bring about the permanent end of something that has caused widespread suffering — dismantle an Imperial operation, collapse a slave network, destroy a superweapon before it deploys.

tollRecovery.title: The Ruin
tollRecovery.description: When you annihilate something irreplaceable to serve your own purpose — destroy a sacred site to deny it to your enemies, wipe out an entire faction to eliminate one target, burn the archive so no one can learn what you did.

destinies.advanceTrigger: When something that shaped the region, faction, or story ceases to exist because of you.
destinies.narrativeHook: This character is drawn toward endings — tearing down what is broken, corrupt, or dangerous. Whether they destroy to protect or destroy to control is the question that defines their path.

destinies.name: Discovery
destinies.tagline: Your fate is to uncover what has been hidden or forgotten.
destinies.coreQuestion: Did something hidden come to light because of you?

hopeRecovery.title: The Revelation
hopeRecovery.description: When you bring a buried truth into the open that changes the fate of others — reveal the conspiracy to the people it would have destroyed, decode the star chart that leads refugees to safety, publish the evidence that topples a regime.

tollRecovery.title: The Theft
tollRecovery.description: When you claim a world-shaping secret and ensure no one else ever learns it — seize the Sith archive, erase the witnesses, lock away the cure so only you control who lives.

destinies.advanceTrigger: When a revelation you unearthed permanently alters the direction of events.
destinies.narrativeHook: This character is drawn toward hidden truths — lost knowledge, buried secrets, forgotten histories. Whether they share what they find or hoard it is the question that defines their path.

destinies.name: Rescue
destinies.tagline: Your fate is to pull others from the edge.
destinies.coreQuestion: Did someone escape a sealed fate because of you?

hopeRecovery.title: The Sacrifice
hopeRecovery.description: When you deliver someone from a fate they could not have escaped alone and pay a lasting price for it — trade your freedom for a prisoner's release, lose something permanent to buy their survival, walk into certain capture so a group can flee the system.

tollRecovery.title: The Exchange
tollRecovery.description: When you save the one who matters to you by condemning others to the fate you pulled them from — leave the rest of the prisoners behind, hand over civilians to secure your crew's release, sacrifice a community's future to rescue a single life.

destinies.advanceTrigger: When someone whose fate was sealed is free because of your actions — not a close call in combat, but a rescue from a situation with no way out.
destinies.narrativeHook: This character is drawn toward the trapped and the doomed — prisoners, hostages, the condemned. Whether they save everyone or only the ones they choose is the question that defines their path.

destinies.name: Creation
destinies.tagline: Your fate is to build something that outlasts you.
destinies.coreQuestion: Does something lasting exist now that didn't before — because of you?

hopeRecovery.title: The Foundation
hopeRecovery.description: When you bring something into existence that fundamentally changes a community's future — establish a colony or rebel cell, broker a lasting peace between factions, build the infrastructure that restores a dying settlement, found an organization that outlives its founder.

tollRecovery.title: The Consumption
tollRecovery.description: When you build your legacy by consuming what others depend on — strip a rival settlement for materials, absorb a smaller operation into yours by force, claim the resources a community needs to fuel your vision, build a criminal empire on the backs of the desperate.

destinies.advanceTrigger: When something you built reshapes how people live, trade, fight, or survive in the region — a base, an alliance, a syndicate, a network, a legacy.
destinies.narrativeHook: This character is drawn toward making things — structures, organizations, alliances, legacies. Whether they build for everyone or build for themselves is the question that defines their path.

destinies.name: Corruption
destinies.tagline: Your fate is to reshape power in the galaxy.
destinies.coreQuestion: Did power change hands because of you?

hopeRecovery.title: The Overthrow
hopeRecovery.description: When you topple a corrupt power structure that has held a population under its heel — expose the governor's crimes, turn a crime lord's lieutenants against him, trigger the collapse of a cartel's hold on a system.

tollRecovery.title: The Coup
tollRecovery.description: When you seize control of a power structure for yourself — take over the syndicate you were sent to destroy, install yourself as the authority in the vacuum you created, replace the tyrant and inherit their throne.

destinies.advanceTrigger: When the power structure of a faction, territory, or institution is permanently different because of you.
destinies.narrativeHook: This character is drawn toward power — who holds it, who abuses it, who deserves it. Whether they dismantle corruption or become the new corruption is the question that defines their path.

destinies.name: Atonement
destinies.tagline: Your fate is to settle a debt that can never be repaid.
destinies.coreQuestion: Was a chapter of your past closed because of you?

hopeRecovery.title: The Reckoning
hopeRecovery.description: When you make restitution that materially changes the lives of those you wronged — return to the place you devastated and rebuild it, surrender yourself to the people you betrayed, sacrifice your position or fortune to undo the damage.

tollRecovery.title: The Erasure
tollRecovery.description: When you erase your debt by destroying the evidence or the people who hold it — silence the last witness, burn the records that prove what you did, eliminate the faction that remembers your crime.

destinies.advanceTrigger: When a specific chapter of your past is permanently closed — through reconciliation or obliteration.
destinies.narrativeHook: This character is haunted by what they have done — or what was done in their name. Whether they face it honestly or bury it violently is the question that defines their path.

destinies.name: Liberation
destinies.tagline: Your fate is to break chains — literal or otherwise.
destinies.coreQuestion: Were the oppressed freed because of you?

hopeRecovery.title: The Emancipation
hopeRecovery.description: When you dismantle a system of captivity and accept the target it paints on you — free an entire labor camp, broadcast the truth that breaks an Empire's grip on a sector, destroy the mechanism that keeps a population compliant.

tollRecovery.title: The Purifier
tollRecovery.description: When you annihilate the captor with no regard for what else burns — destroy the prison with loyalists still inside, assassinate the warden in a way that destabilizes the entire region, tear down the institution even though thousands depend on it for survival.

destinies.advanceTrigger: When a population, system, or territory that was under someone's control is no longer — because of you.
destinies.narrativeHook: This character is drawn toward captivity and oppression — wherever chains exist, they feel the pull to break them. Whether they free others cleanly or burn the cage with everyone inside is the question that defines their path.

destinies.name: Ascendancy
destinies.tagline: Your fate is to rise beyond what you were born to.
destinies.coreQuestion: Did you rise to a station you didn't hold before?

hopeRecovery.title: The Elevation
hopeRecovery.description: When you ascend and use your new standing to elevate those who cannot rise alone — use your new rank to shield the vulnerable, open a seat at the table for the voiceless, leverage your position to change the rules for everyone below you.

tollRecovery.title: The Usurper
tollRecovery.description: When you climb by pulling down the person above you — betray the mentor who made you, orchestrate a rival's downfall to claim their seat, accept a crown you know was bought with someone else's blood.

destinies.advanceTrigger: When you hold a title, territory, rank, or seat of power that fundamentally changes your standing in the galaxy.
destinies.narrativeHook: This character is drawn upward — toward rank, influence, and legacy. Whether they lift others as they rise or stand on the fallen is the question that defines their path.
